# jamfschool_unenroll_device (Action)

Schedules removal of the management profile from a device.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Remove the management profile from a device.
action "jamfschool_unenroll_device" "unenroll" {
  config {
    serial_number = "C02ABC123DEF"
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `serial_number` (String) Device serial number. Provide this or `udid`.
- `udid` (String) Device UDID. Provide this or `serial_number`.
